summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PR candidates plus hydrated linked issues. No GitHub mutations are allowed by the job. No PR has a complete merge preflight with passed Codex /review evidence, so no merge_candidate is emitted. Security preflight found no security-sensitive job refs. Several PRs are independently useful but need maintainer/review-gate decisions or branch repair before finalization.

actions.reason: Useful contributor PR with clear bug scope, but failing check and missing required merge preflight block merge recommendation; repair the contributor branch rather than replace it because maintainer_can_modify is true.
Feature/API surface expansion has passing checks but is broad enough to require maintainer product/API approval and the required Codex /review merge preflight is missing.

Narrow useful bug fix, but failing proof and waiting-on-author state block merge/fixed-by-candidate closeout; since maintainer_can_modify is true, a repair path on the contributor branch is appropriate.
Independently useful doctor feature, but the maintainer rebase note plus unknown mergeability and missing Codex /review preflight require maintainer/rebase gate resolution before merge.
Broad doctor feature with an unresolved-or-follow-up review-bot privacy/output concern and missing required merge preflight; maintainer judgment is needed before finalization.
Related open issue is plausibly fixed by #92957 after validation/merge, but post-merge close is disabled and #92957 is not merge-ready under this plan.
Same Codex exec-adjacent area as #92294 but a different root cause and product/config contract; keep out of this PR inventory shard.
The issue is covered by #92294 if the PR is repaired and merged, but closure is blocked by job settings and by the candidate PR not being merge-ready.

needs_human: #92957: maintainer product/API decision and Codex /review merge preflight are required before merging broad agents.setDefault RPC surface.
#59365: maintainer/rebase gate and Codex /review merge preflight are required before merging doctor volatile-filesystem detection.
#59414: maintainer decision is required on the remaining Windows home-path redaction review concern and Codex /review merge preflight before merging doctor node-runtime diagnostics.
